message:
feat(engine): harden parser, extension registry, TS normalization, typed array validation, and parallel routing

Parser (parser.rs):
- Unify function/async function/generator dispatch: collapse separate
  `function `, `function*(`, and `async function ` branches into a
  single conditional covering `function `, `function*`, `async function `,
  and `async function*` prefixes
- Reject anonymous function declarations (including generators) with an
  explicit "function declarations require a binding name" error instead
  of silently mis-parsing
- Add tests: generator without space after keyword, async generator,
  anonymous function/generator rejection

Extension registry (extension_registry.rs):
- Add PublisherKeyMismatch error variant and publish-time check: if the
  manifest-embedded publisher key does not match the registered publisher
  key, reject with VerificationFailed audit event and publisher_key_mismatch
  error code
- Add verify_package publisher key cross-check: report mismatch in
  verification result errors
- Fix search pagination: apply .truncate(limit) after deterministic sort
  instead of .take(limit) before sort, ensuring limit selects from a
  stable ordering
- Add tests for limit-after-sort, publish rejection on key mismatch,
  and verify_package key mismatch reporting

Parallel parser (parallel_parser.rs):
- Extract collect_internal_partition_boundaries() that filters out
  trailing-EOF-only boundaries, preventing single-trailing-newline inputs
  from being routed to parallel mode with no usable split points
- Cap effective_workers to (internal_boundary_count + 1) in routing
  digest so workers never exceed actual chunk capacity
- Add tests: trailing EOF newline stays serial, internal boundary
  requirement, routing digest worker capping

TS normalization (ts_normalization.rs):
- Introduce next_code_token_index() for comment-aware token scanning in
  import/export detection and rewriting
- Add is_type_only_named_specifier() that distinguishes `type Foo`
  (type-only, should elide) from `type as runtimeType` (runtime binding
  named "type", must preserve)
- Add statement_uses_type_only_import_export_syntax() and
  source_contains_type_only_import_export_syntax() replacing naive
  substring checks with proper token-level analysis
- Preserve `import type from "pkg"` (default import of module named
  "type") instead of incorrectly eliding it
- Add tests for all three false-positive scenarios: `{ type as X }`,
  `import type from`, `export { type as X }`

Typed array fast lane (typed_array_fast_lane.rs):
- Add MisalignedByteOffset error variant with offset/alignment fields
- Add byte_offset alignment check in validate_typed_array() before
  byte_length validation
- Add Display impl, serde roundtrip, and validation tests

Activation lifecycle (activation_lifecycle.rs):
- Clear injected_secret_keys on rollback from PendingActivation state
  to prevent stale secrets from persisting across reactivation cycles
- Add test verifying secret key clearing on rollback

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
